evals.name: ace-real-actionables-ticket
evals.expected_output: One actionables MD file written beside the ticket under .scratch/data-driven-overhaul/actionables/, with real ACE repo paths, vertical-slice step order, every AC mapped to a step and a verification row, and no full implementation dump.
expectations: Output file written to .scratch/data-driven-overhaul/actionables/01-timeouts-and-caps-knobs--actionables.md
Every File path named in steps exists in the ACE repo at run time (no invented paths)
Steps reference the five files the ticket calls out: lib/config/runtimeConfig.js, config/runtime-ops.json, graph/nodes/planner.js, graph/nodes/textWorker.js, services/profileMerge.js
Includes shared header sections: Goal, Preconditions, Acceptance criteria to verification, Do not touch
Each ticket AC checkbox maps to at least one numbered step and at least one verification row
No step contains a paste-ready full working implementation (sketches only, <=15 lines)
Includes Final verification section with the jest commands from the ticket
Header carries a stale-path regeneration warning

evals.name: ace-real-pseudocode-ticket
evals.expected_output: One pseudocode MD file written beside the ticket, structured as named Walkthrough units each with Purpose, Inputs/outputs, Pseudocode, and a Touch list of real files; ends with end-to-end sequence and final verification.
expectations: Output file written to .scratch/data-driven-overhaul/actionables/03-prompt-template-engine--pseudocode.md
Has a Walkthrough section split into named Units (not a flat checklist)
Every Unit has Purpose, Inputs/outputs, Pseudocode, and a Touch list
Touch list paths exist in the ACE repo at run time

Units reference the four files the ticket creates plus the source graph/prompts.js: models/PromptTemplate.js, lib/ai/promptResolver.js, config/prompts-default.json, scripts/seedPrompts.js, graph/prompts.js
Includes End-to-end sequence section tying Units together
Pseudocode describes shape (LRU cache, resolver, fallback) without becoming a paste-ready implementation
Includes Final verification section

evals.name: ace-real-actionables-set
evals.expected_output: One actionables file per ticket (six total) written under .scratch/data-driven-overhaul/actionables/ with NN-slug--actionables.md naming, plus a chat index table. Cross-ticket blocked-by is honored or noted; frontier ticket is flagged as the start row.
expectations: Six actionables files written, one per ticket in data-driven-overhaul (01 through 06)
All six filenames match the pattern NN-slug--actionables.md
Each file maps its ticket's ACs to steps and verification rows
Every File path across all six files exists in the ACE repo at run time
Cross-ticket dependencies are noted (data-driven-overhaul tickets say 'Blocked by: None', so dep notes may be 'none' but must be present)
Chat response includes an index table: ticket, mode, file path, blocked-by, ready

evals.name: ais-skills-synthetic-actionables-ticket
evals.expected_output: One actionables MD file written beside the ticket under .scratch/actionables-index-file/actionables/, with paths into the 1-to-actionables skill folder itself (SKILL.md, references/flags-and-modes.md, references/output-templates.md). Tests the skill on a non-application repo.
expectations: Output file written to .scratch/actionables-index-file/actionables/01-scope-set-readme--actionables.md
Steps reference the three skill files the ticket names: SKILL.md, references/flags-and-modes.md, references/output-templates.md
Every File path in steps exists in the AI-Skills repo at run time
Includes shared header sections: Goal, Preconditions, AC to verification, Do not touch
Each of the four ticket ACs maps to at least one step and one verification row
No step contains a paste-ready full working implementation
Header carries a stale-path regeneration warning
